gist.headline: Daily Greenhouse Check
gist.blurb: Our automated bots just finished their daily rounds, watering the plants and updating the health metrics for all community apps.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of community app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse status in the APPS registry.
gist.impact: Keeps the community app showcase up-to-date with the latest health and usage statistics.
gist.visual_concept: The pollinations bee and the monitor robot checking on a digital greenhouse. The robot is holding a clipboard with a checklist, while the bee waters some pixelated code-plants.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot watering a digital garden where code-plants sprout from lime green (#ecf874) flower pots. A chunky pixel robot with a CRT monitor head stands nearby holding a tiny clipboard with a checklist. Soft lavender and peach pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, chunky sprites.
